header.title: GHS Label Quick Search
header.subtitle: Chemical Hazard Label Search
search.inputLabel: Enter CAS Number or Chemical Name
search.inputHint: CAS numbers, English names, and Chinese names are supported
search.batchPlaceholder:
Comma, newline, or tab separated
e.g.
64-17-5
67-56-1
7732-18-5
search.batchHint: Comma, newline, or tab separated. Max 100 entries.
search.batchOverLimitDetail: Batch search is limited to {{limit}} entries; you have {{count}}. Please remove {{excess}} entries before submitting.
search.batchDuplicateSummary: {{count}} duplicate CAS value(s) ignored. Batch search sends only the first occurrence.
search.batchInvalidSummary: {{count}} invalid CAS value(s) were not sent: {{examples}}
search.batchReadySummary: {{count}} valid unique CAS value(s) ready from {{inputCount}} pasted item(s).
search.batchNoValidCas: No valid CAS numbers are ready to search. Check the format, for example 64-17-5.
search.errorEmpty: Please enter a CAS number or chemical name
search.errorSingle: Search failed. Please check your connection and try again.
search.errorBatch: Batch search failed. Please check your connection and try again.
results.title: Results
results.workflowSummaryBody: Start with the highlighted action, then print or export only the rows that are ready.
results.nextActionReviewBody: Start with {{reason}} ({{count}}). {{ready}} item(s) can still move to print or export after confirmation.
results.nextActionReadyBody: {{count}} item(s) are label-ready. Labels and exports will use the same confirmed GHS selection.
results.nextActionNoLabelBody: Review the GHS gaps or source warnings before printing labels.
results.nextActionNotFoundTitle: Check the CAS list or report missing data
results.nextActionNotFoundBody: No usable rows are ready yet. Confirm the CAS format, then submit a correction request if the item should exist.
results.workflowValidUniqueBody: CAS values sent to lookup after cleanup.
results.workflowUnresolvedBody: Rows that need correction or retry.
results.workflowReviewBody: Includes lookup gaps, source conflicts, missing Chinese names, or GHS data gaps.
results.workflowExportBody: Full batch size before filters; exports follow the current visible scope.
results.reviewActionReportNoGhs: Report no-GHS gap after SDS check
results.noGhsDataHint: Absence does not imply safety — consult the SDS.
results.ghsDataNoPictograms: GHS text found, but no pictogram to display
results.ghsDataNoPictogramsHint: Review the detail view and SDS before treating this as a no-hazard result.
detail.missingChineseNameHint: This result has an English identity, but no trusted Chinese name in the curated dictionary. Report it with SDS or supplier evidence so maintainers can review it.
detail.noGhsDataBanner: PubChem lists this chemical but has no GHS classification data. This does not mean it is safe — please consult the official SDS.
detail.ghsDataNoPictograms: GHS text found, but no pictogram is available
detail.ghsDataNoPictogramsHint: Review the H/P statements and source links before treating this as a no-pictogram or low-risk result.
detail.referenceVerificationHint: Use these links as verification starting points. Final label text still depends on the current SDS, supplier label, and local rules.
prepared.title: Prepare solution from this chemical
prepared.subtitle: Create a label for a dilution or working solution. Hazard data will be copied from the parent chemical.
prepared.formNote: This workflow does NOT re-classify the mixture. The label uses the parent chemical's hazard data with a concentration / solvent annotation. Operational fields (prepared by / date / expiry) are what you record here — they are not derived. Always verify against the official SDS before use.
prepared.recentHeading: Recent for this chemical — click to reuse these inputs
prepared.presetHeading: Saved presets for this chemical — click to reuse concentration / solvent
prepared.recentHint: Recent instances keep the operator for context, but the prepared date resets to today on reuse.
prepared.presetHint: Saved presets are recipe-only. Operational fields stay fresh on every reuse.
prepared.presetNameHint: Used only for reuse in the app. It does not affect hazard data or the printed classification.
prepared.operationalSubheading: User-entered identifiers for lab workflow. Not derived from GHS data.
prepared.sidebarEmptyHint: Prepare and print a solution once, then reprint it here later with fresh parent hazard data.
prepared.reprintParentUnavailable: The parent chemical could not be refreshed. Please search it again before reprinting.
prepared.reprintBuildFailed: Could not rebuild the prepared label from this saved entry.
detail.provenanceCacheTooltip: Served from local cache (max 24 hours old)
detail.provenanceCacheTooltipWithAge: Served from local cache · fetched {{age}} (may be up to 24 hours stale)
detail.sourceConflictHint: The app keeps these reports separate instead of merging them. Change the selected report only when your SDS, supplier label, or local rule supports it; this selection affects detail, preview, and print output.
detail.customSettingsHint: Keep the default unless your SDS, supplier label, or local rule supports a different report.
detail.classificationHint: Review differences before switching. The selected report is saved locally and used by preview and printing.
compare.title: Compare GHS Classifications
compare.subtitle: {{count}} chemical(s) selected
compare.evidenceHint: The system ranking favors report count, ECHA source, hazard coverage, then original source order for stable ties.
label.title: GHS Label Printing
label.templateStandardTip: Best default for everyday bottle labels
label.templateFullDesc: Identity, pictograms, signal word, H/P statements, and responsible contact
label.templateFullTip: Best fit for shipped-container style primary labels
label.templateQRDesc: Identity + QR + one scan-first hazard teaser
label.templateQRTip: Use when the full detail should live behind the QR
label.printPurposeBody: Choose the real-world job first. Shipped-container labels keep the full hazard hierarchy; smaller QR or quick-ID labels are clearly marked as supplemental.
label.purposeShippingDesc: Full primary label with core GHS elements.
label.purposeShippingTip: Recommended default: use roomy stock and complete H/P statements.
label.purposeQrSupplementDesc: Small label that points users to detail.
label.purposeQrSupplementTip: Use only as a supplemental label when space is tight.
label.sizeSmallTip: Use when the label must stay compact
label.sizeMediumTip: Best default for standard bottle labels
label.sizeLargeDesc: More breathing room for hazard text
label.sizeLargeTip: Use when the hazard hierarchy needs space
label.smallSizeHint: Tight density works best with shorter names and simpler hazard sets
label.selectedLabelsSummary: Adjust quantities only when you need multiple copies.
label.selectedLabelsWithPagesSummary: {{labels}} label(s), about {{pages}} page(s). Adjust copies only when needed.
label.selectedLabelsContinuationSummary: {{sourceLabels}} selected label(s) expands to {{labels}} extra label(s), about {{pages}} page(s).
label.noPrintableHazardData: No printable GHS hazard data is available for this selection. Review the SDS or source links before making a hazard label.
label.previewHint: Click "Print Labels" to open the print dialog. You can verify the layout in the print preview.
label.profileHint: Saved separately from per-print fields. Shown on labels to identify the responsible lab or supplier.
label.profileRequiredHint: Complete primary labels need this identity before printing.
label.profileOptionalHint: Supplemental labels can print without this, but you can keep it saved for primary labels.
label.customFieldsHint: Optional — empty fields won't appear on labels
label.settingsPreviewIntro: The app chooses a printable output first. Adjust only when the preview needs a different physical stock.
label.settingsBody: Start with a stock preset, then fine-tune spacing and nudges without leaving the modal.
label.advancedPrintOptionsHint: Template overrides, density, calibration, custom fields, and saved jobs are kept here so the main workflow stays focused on choosing and printing the right label.
label.templateOverrideHint: Purpose presets choose the recommended template automatically; override only for a special label job.
label.advancedLayoutHint: Use these only when the core purpose and stock preset need extra tuning.
label.recentPrintsEmpty: Recent print jobs will appear here so you can reload the same label set in one click.
label.stockPresetsHint: Presets are a starting point. Any manual spacing or nudge change switches the layout into custom tuning.
label.useA4PrimaryHint: Keeps all pictograms and complete statements on one full-page primary label.
label.useFullPagePrimaryHint: Keeps all pictograms and complete statements on a complete full-page primary label.
label.outputPlanReadyBody: The selected stock can print the current output without hiding safety-critical content.
label.outputPlanContinuationBody: This complete A4/Letter label uses extra pages so all available pictograms and H/P text remain printable.
label.outputPlanPendingBody: Select at least one chemical to let the app choose a safe printable output.
label.outputPlanRecommendFullPage: This stock cannot carry the complete primary label clearly. Use {{stock}} and keep this smaller label as supplemental if needed.
label.outputPlanContinuationNotice: This content is too dense for one physical label, so the app will print the complete label with extra pages.
label.outputPlanMissingProfile: Complete primary labels need responsible lab or supplier name, phone, and address before printing.
label.outputPlanSupplementalNotice: This output is printable as a supplemental label, not a complete primary container label.
label.outputPlanMissingHazardData: This item does not have enough GHS hazard content to produce a hazard label.
label.outputPlanUpstreamHazardData: PubChem hazard data could not be verified right now, so the app will not print a hazard label from incomplete data.
label.outputPlanInvalidBody: Even this complete stock is too dense for one label. Use extra pages before printing.
label.primaryOutputSizeHint: Choose the actual label or paper size first. The app scales text and pictograms for that stock, then routes dense content to A4 or Letter only when needed.
label.supplementalOutputSizeHint: Choose the small stock you will actually apply. These outputs stay supplemental and keep pictograms visible.
label.outputBasicsHint: These choices directly affect the printed label and preview.
label.outputOutcomePendingTitle: Choose a chemical to plan output
label.outputOutcomePendingBody: Select a result and the app will choose the safest printable output for the target size.
label.outputOutcomeUseFullPageTitle: Use {{stock}} for a complete primary label
label.outputOutcomeUseFullPageBody: The current target is too small for complete content. Switch to {{stock}} for the full label, then print a smaller supplemental label only if needed.
label.recoveryUseFullPageBody: {{currentStock}} is too small for complete primary-label content. Print the complete primary label on {{stock}} first; use the smaller stock only as a supplemental label if needed.
label.recoveryProfileBody: {{stock}} is planned as a complete primary label, so name, phone, and address must be present before print handoff.
label.recoveryHazardBody: The app cannot print a hazard label until this result has usable GHS hazard content. Verify SDS/source data before choosing a label stock.
label.recoveryInvalidStockValue: Use a larger stock or extra pages
label.recoveryInvalidStockBody: {{stock}} cannot carry this output truthfully. Keep every available GHS pictogram visible, then move dense H/P detail to a larger complete label or extra pages.
label.outputOutcomeProfileBody: Complete primary labels need responsible lab or supplier name, phone, and address. Supplemental labels can stay secondary.
label.outputOutcomeHazardsBody: The app will not print a hazard label when source GHS data is unavailable or unverified.
label.outputOutcomeInvalidBody: This stock cannot produce a truthful label. Use a larger primary label or extra pages.
label.outputOutcomeContinuationTitle: Complete A4/Letter label will print with extra pages
label.outputOutcomeContinuationBody: The app will keep identity, CAS, signal word, and every GHS pictogram on each page, then continue the full H/P text over additional pages.
label.outputOutcomeQrBody: This prints a scan-first supplement with identity, QR, and all available pictograms. QR opens {{target}} support and does not replace a complete primary label.
label.outputOutcomeQuickIdBody: This prints a bench-side quick-ID supplement with identity, signal word, and every available pictogram. It does not replace a complete primary label.
label.outputOutcomeContainerFrontTitle: {{target}} is printable as a front label
label.outputOutcomeSupplementalBody: This prints on {{stock}} as a front or supplemental label: identity, CAS/case, signal word, every available pictogram, and priority H summaries. Full H/P belongs on A4/Letter, SDS/QR, or a back label.
label.outputOutcomeCompleteBody: This prints on {{stock}} with all available pictograms and full H/P text for the selected content.
label.printContinuationAction: Print complete A4/Letter set ({{labels}} labels / {{pages}} pages)
label.printReadyBatchAction: Print {{ready}} ready {{purpose}} labels on {{stock}} ({{labels}} labels / {{pages}} pages; {{excluded}} excluded)
label.printAcknowledgedBatchAction: Print {{count}} selected {{purpose}} labels on {{stock}} ({{labels}} labels / {{pages}} pages; {{excluded}} excluded)
label.batchFitReportBody: One fixed stock is kept for this batch. Ready labels can print now; review or excluded labels stay visible before handoff.
label.batchReasonTextOnlyQuickId: GHS text exists but no pictogram is available for Quick ID
label.batchReasonContinuation: Full H/P text needs extra pages
label.batchReasonCompleteTooDense: Complete content is too dense for this stock
label.batchReasonSupplementalTooDense: Supplemental content is too dense for this stock
label.batchReviewListMore: {{count}} more item(s) in the exported review list
label.batchPrintScopeBody: Ready labels and required extra labels are included by default. Add compact fallback labels only if that is acceptable for this batch.
label.batchIncludeReducedPurposeHint: These keep identity and pictograms on the chosen stock, but they are not complete A4/Letter labels.
label.batchIncludeContinuationHint: These keep one chemical on the same chosen stock across multiple labels.
label.batchPrintScopeSummary: {{count}} item(s) will print as {{purpose}} on {{stock}}; {{excluded}} excluded; {{review}} review item(s) not selected.
label.calibrationHint: These values are stored in the current print config so you can reuse stock-specific calibration.
label.customStockSizeHint: Enter the real label size only when the curated presets do not match your label roll or sheet.
label.previewFocusBody: This is the label fragment that will be printed.
label.previewFocusBatchBody: The preview follows the selected representative item, while the sheet view shows the current selected batch print scope.
label.previewFocusEmptyBody: Select at least one chemical to preview the real content density.
label.previewInspectionHint: Fit shows the whole label first; inspect mode enlarges details for checking before printing.
label.previewRealFragmentHint: This preview reuses the same HTML fragment that gets written into the print document.
label.outputChecklistHint: Counts come from the same content model used by print preflight.
label.outputPrintedChecklistHint: This describes the current physical label only. Complete H/P detail belongs on the primary label or SDS/QR path.
label.outputPictogramsHint: Available pictograms must stay on the label.
label.outputQrTargetHint: Scans to {{label}} ({{source}}). Verify the destination before relying on it.
label.outputQrTargetMissingHint: No safe QR destination is available for this result.
label.outputQrScanPathHint: The small QR label does not print full H/P text.
label.outputNotOnSmallLabelHint: Quick-ID labels keep identity and pictograms readable.
label.outputHCodesOnlyHint: Small labels stay identity-first. Use A4/Letter or SDS/QR for full H/P text.
label.outputSummaryOnlyHint: Small labels stay identity-first. Use A4/Letter or SDS/QR for full H/P text.
label.previewRiskReady: This combination looks balanced for the current content load.
label.multipleGhsPrintWarningBody: This print will use the system-suggested primary classification unless you confirm a different version in the result row or detail view before printing.
label.previewRiskEmpty: Select a chemical to inspect live density and scan balance.
label.previewRiskName: The current name pair is long enough to pressure a compact layout.
label.previewRiskPictograms: This chemical carries enough pictograms that compact templates may feel crowded.
label.previewRiskPrepared: Prepared-solution metadata will compete with hazard content on compact templates.
label.previewRiskCompactHidden: Compact templates intentionally hide secondary information so the main hazards stay readable.
label.previewRiskCompactNames: Compact labels use the current UI language first so pictograms and identity stay readable.
label.effectiveNameDisplayHint: This smaller stock will print {{effective}} first so the label stays readable. Use A4 or Letter primary labels for full bilingual text.
label.previewRiskProfile: No lab or supplier profile is set, so the print will stay generic.
label.previewRiskQr: QR layouts work best when the left side stays short and the QR block remains dominant.
label.previewRiskQrSupplement: QR supplement labels are not complete shipped-container labels; keep the matching SDS or primary label available.
label.previewRiskQuickId: Quick-ID labels are only for bench-side identification and should not replace the primary hazard label.
label.previewRiskShippingTemplate: Shipped-container purpose should use the Full template so identity, pictograms, signal word, H/P statements, and contact information stay together.
label.previewRiskShippingStock: Shipped-container labels should use roomy stock; compact stock will force omissions or cramped text.
label.previewRiskShippingProfile: Add the lab or supplier profile before printing shipped-container style labels.
label.previewRiskShippingBlockedDensity: This content is too dense for the current complete-label stock. Use a full-page primary stock for a complete label; QR supplement is only a secondary option.
label.previewRiskShippingDensity: This chemical has many H/P statements. Review the print preview carefully, or split supporting detail to SDS/QR while keeping the primary hazards readable.
label.previewHazardPlaceholder: Signal word, pictograms, and hazards will appear here.
label.previewIconFocus: Compact labels should keep pictograms and the signal word dominant.
label.previewScanFocus: Scan-first layouts should keep only the essentials next to the QR.
label.stockPresetSmallStripNote: Compact landscape stock for tubes and narrow bottles.
label.stockPresetSmallRackNote: Portrait stock with more rows for bench-side secondary labels.
label.stockPresetMediumBottleNote: Balanced default for common bottle labels.
label.stockPresetAvery5163Note: Common Letter-sheet bottle label size for North American office printers.
label.stockPresetAvery5164Note: Roomier Letter-sheet label for dense bottle or container content.
label.stockPresetBrother62Note: Common Brother/DK-style continuous roll width for supplemental bench labels.
label.stockPresetMediumRackNote: Wider labels for trays, boxes, and shallow containers.
label.stockPresetLargePrimaryNote: Roomy front label for identity, GHS pictograms, signal word, and priority H summaries.
label.stockPresetA4PrimaryNote: Single full-page primary label for dense shipped-container content and proofing.
label.stockPresetLetterPrimaryNote: Single US Letter primary label for dense content and North American printers.
favorites.title: My Favorites
favorites.emptyHint: Click ☆ in search results to add favorites
history.title: Search History
empty.title: Start with a CAS number or chemical name, then turn GHS reference data into usable labels and records
empty.subtitle: A free quick utility for labs, classrooms, and small R&D teams. Find traceable hazard references first, then print labels, export data, or save common chemicals.
empty.workflowSearchDesc: Enter a CAS number, English name, or Chinese name to find the chemical and PubChem source.
empty.workflowReviewDesc: Check pictograms, signal words, H/P codes, and source context before returning to the SDS.
empty.workflowUseDesc: Turn results into labels, prepared-solution records, or spreadsheets for the real workflow.
empty.featureBatchDesc: Search up to 100 CAS numbers at once
empty.featurePrintDesc: Auto-planned primary and supplemental labels with live preview
empty.featureExcelDesc: Export full GHS data to spreadsheet
empty.featureFavoriteDesc: Save frequently used chemicals for quick access
error.title: Application Error
error.message: Please refresh the page. Contact support if the issue persists.
export.errorXlsx: Excel export failed. Please check your connection and try again.
export.csvFallbackHint: Server export was unavailable — saved with a local fallback.
export.dataStateTextOnly: Found with GHS text but no pictogram
export.dataStateNoGhs: Found with no GHS classification data
export.reviewReasonMultipleClassificatio: Multiple GHS classifications need primary confirmation
exportPreview.title: Export Preview
exportPreview.subtitle: Confirm {{scope}} ({{count}} row(s)) and columns before downloading {{format}}.
exportPreview.hiddenRows: {{count}} more row(s) will also be exported.
exportPreview.workbookLayoutBody: XLSX includes GHS Results, Ready Rows, Needs Review, Unresolved, and Pilot Summary sheets for batch cleanup.
exportPreview.safetyNote: Exported data is still a quick reference. Verify final labels against the SDS, supplier label, and local regulations. Formula-like text is neutralized by the export flow to prevent spreadsheet auto-execution.
print.title: GHS Label Print
print.qrSupplementNotice: Supplemental QR label - verify against SDS / primary label before use.
print.quickIdNotice: Quick-ID label only - not a complete shipped-container label.
print.supplementalHazardNotice: Supplemental hazard label - not a complete primary container label.
print.layoutBlocked: This label content is overflowing or clipped. Choose A4 Primary or another larger complete-label stock before printing. QR supplement is not a substitute for a complete primary label.
print.layoutBlockedDetailed: This label is still overflowing or clipped on {{stock}} ({{size}}). GHS pictograms and CAS must remain visible; choose A4/Letter Primary or another larger readable stock before printing. QR supplement is not a substitute for a complete primary label. Check: {{issueTypes}}
print.imageBlocked: Required GHS pictograms or QR images have not loaded. Check the network and print again so the output does not miss safety information.
print.preparedNote: Prepared solution — hazard data copied from the parent chemical. Classification may differ for the actual mixture; verify against the official SDS before use.
footer.disclaimer: For reference only. Refer to official SDS.
footer.maintainedAsUtility: Labels and hazard content stay ad-free; support and workflow links stay outside the safety-critical label content.
upstream.bannerTitle: PubChem was temporarily unavailable for {{count}} result(s)
upstream.bannerBody: Those entries may not reflect current hazard data. Please retry before relying on this result, and always verify against the official SDS.
trust.authoritativeNote: Quick reference only. The official Safety Data Sheet (SDS), supplier label, and local regulations remain the authoritative source for final hazard classification.
trust.supplementalNote: This output can support identification or scanning, but it is not a complete shipped-container label. Keep a complete primary label available for final use.
trust.blockedNote: Required hazard data or profile information is missing. Resolve the blocking issue before printing a hazard label.
trust.printFooter: For reference only — confirm against the official SDS, supplier label, and local regulations before use.
productTrust.title: Search, verify, and print without noise
productTrust.body: This free utility keeps the safety task first: find a chemical, review traceable GHS references, then print or export what you need.
productTrust.resultsBody: Report data issues or request batch labels, SDS, QR, prepared-solution, or internal deployment workflows after the safety task is complete.
productTrust.sourceBody: Search starts from PubChem and external SDS entry points. Final use still requires official SDS, supplier labels, and local regulation review.
productTrust.noAdsBody: Printed labels, hazard summaries, and warning content do not carry promotional content that could interfere with safety reading.
productTrust.feedbackBody: Corrections and workflow requests are collected outside labels so hazard communication stays uncluttered.
correctionDialog.title: Send this to the review queue
correctionDialog.body: This creates a tracked correction request for admin review. Curated dictionary or reference data will not change until a maintainer verifies evidence.
correctionDialog.submitFailed: Could not submit the correction request.
correctionDialog.successTitle: Correction request is in the queue
correctionDialog.successBody: Request {{id}} is ready for admin review.
label.densityHint: This controls content density, not the physical stock dimensions.
pilot.manualEntryFailed: Failed to save manual dictionary entry.
pilot.manualChineseNameRequiresCjk: Chinese name must contain Chinese characters. Put English aliases in the English name or alias fields.
pilot.manualEntriesNeedReviewHint: Pending entries are kept for curation, but do not affect public lookup, labels, or exports until approved.
pilot.referenceStatusFailed: Failed to update reference link status.
pilot.manualEntryNeedsEvidence: Manual dictionary entry marked as needs evidence.
pilot.manualEntryDecisionFailed: Failed to update manual dictionary entry status.
pilot.missNeedsEvidence: Miss query marked as needs evidence.
pilot.missResolvedCasRequired: Enter a CAS number before marking this query resolved.
pilot.missRetentionSummary: {{count}} stale row(s) outside {{days}} days; {{retained}} needs-evidence row(s) retained.
pilot.noStaleMissQueries: No stale miss-query rows need cleanup.
pilot.purgeMissConfirm: Delete stale miss-query telemetry outside the retention window?
pilot.purgeMissFailed: Failed to clean up stale miss-query rows.
pilot.triageHint: Compact operator view for deciding whether the next pilot action is data review, unresolved search cleanup, source review, or telemetry maintenance.
pilot.correctionRequestsHint: Station and in-app reports land here first. Approve only after source evidence is reviewed.
pilot.convertedCorrectionCandidateListHi: These reports already created pending manual dictionary entries. Public lookup, labels, and exports are unchanged until the manual entry is approved.
pilot.noConvertedCorrectionCandidates: No converted correction candidates are waiting in manual review.
pilot.candidateEvidenceHint: Review-only. This does not affect public lookup, labels, or exports until approved into a curated record.
pilot.candidateManualEntryCreated: Pending manual dictionary review entry created.
pilot.candidateManualEntryPendingHint: A pending manual dictionary review entry has already been created from this candidate.
pilot.candidateManualEntryFailed: Failed to create or link the pending manual dictionary entry.
pilot.candidateManualEntryMissingIdentit: Candidate needs a CAS number and at least one name before it can become a review entry.
pilot.correctionRequestListHint: Data-quality reports stay here until an admin finds evidence and applies the approved dictionary or reference change.
pilot.sidebarSubtitle: Review pilot health, unresolved lookups, and dictionary growth tasks. This surface is for admin-only curation.
pilot.missQueriesHint: These are the unresolved searches that are most worth backfilling into the dictionary.
pilot.pendingAliasReviewHint: PubChem synonym candidates land here first. Approve only the ones you actually want to resolve in-app.
pilot.addManualEntryHint: Use this when the static seed dictionary needs a lab-specific name override or missing chemical.
pilot.chineseNameCurationHint: Use this field only for verified Chinese names. English synonyms belong in the English name or alias fields.
pilot.adminAccessHint: Dictionary curation and pilot telemetry are admin-only. Enter the server admin key for this session.
label.outputGoalSizeHint: Pick where this will be attached. The app chooses complete primary, supplemental, quick-ID, or QR output for that target.
label.targetMainContainerDesc: Roomy front label for the main container; use A4/Letter for complete H/P.
label.targetBottleDesc: Common bottle stock; prints front-label essentials and priority H summaries.
label.targetVialDesc: Small secondary ID that keeps icons visible.
label.targetQrSupplementDesc: Scan-first label with identity and pictograms.
label.changeStockHint: Use this only when the physical paper or label roll is different. The preview and planner will update immediately.
label.moreStockChoicesHint: Use these when your printer stock matches them. The same planner and preview checks still apply.
label.simplifiedOutputHint: Choose one output type. Small labels continue onto a second or third label instead of dropping CAS, names, QR, or GHS pictograms.
label.targetCompleteDesc: Full information label with CAS, English, Chinese, every GHS pictogram, H/P statements, and QR.
label.targetQrSmallDesc: Small label with CAS, English, Chinese, QR, and all GHS pictograms across extra labels.
label.targetIdentitySmallDesc: Small label with CAS, English, Chinese, and all GHS pictograms across extra labels.
label.outputOutcomeQrSmallBody: This prints CAS, English, Chinese, QR, and every GHS pictogram. If icons do not fit, the same output continues onto another small label.
label.outputOutcomeIdentitySmallBody: This prints CAS, English, Chinese, and every GHS pictogram. It does not include H/P text or QR.
label.fixedIdentityDisplay: Always prints CAS first, English second, and Chinese third.
